data.title: HDFC Bank Receives SEBI Warning on Custodian Activities
data.description:
An announcement from Hdfc Bank ( (HDB) ) is now available.

On April 2, 2025, HDFC Bank received an administrative warning letter from the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) regarding alleged non-compliance with certain regulatory guidelines related to its custodian activities. The bank has stated that there is no financial impact from this warning and plans to take necessary steps to address the issues highlighted by SEBI.

More about Hdfc Bank

HDFC Bank Limited is a prominent financial institution in India, operating primarily in the banking sector. The bank offers a wide range of financial services, including retail banking, wholesale banking, and treasury operations, with a strong market presence in India.

data.title: Oiltek International Proposes Strategic Listing Transfer and New Constitution
data.description:
Koh Brothers Eco Engineering Limited ( (SG:5HV) ) has issued an update.

Oiltek International Limited, a company incorporated in Singapore, has announced an Extraordinary General Meeting to discuss significant changes. The company is considering transferring its listing from the Catalist Board to the Mainboard, which could enhance its market presence and investor appeal. Additionally, the adoption of a new constitution is proposed to align with these strategic changes, potentially impacting the company’s governance structure.

data.title: ENCE Energia y Celulosa Approves 2024 Financials and Sustainability Report
data.description:
ENCE Energia y Celulosa ( (ES:ENC) ) has provided an update.

The Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders of ENCE Energia y Celulosa approved key agreements, including the annual accounts and management report for the fiscal year 2024, and the Sustainability Report 2024. The meeting also approved the application of the fiscal year’s positive result of €46.7 million, with allocations to interim dividends and covering previous negative results, reflecting the company’s stable financial performance and commitment to shareholder value.

More about ENCE Energia y Celulosa

ENCE Energia y Celulosa, S.A. operates in the energy and cellulose industry, focusing on the production of renewable energy and pulp products. The company is known for its commitment to sustainability and operates within the European market.

data.title: Cadeler A/S Announces Share Transactions by Key Stakeholders
data.description:
Cadeler A/S Sponsored ADR ( (CDLR) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 3, 2025, Cadeler A/S announced a series of share transactions involving BW Altor Pte. Ltd., closely associated with Andreas Sohmen-Pao, Chairman of the Board. These transactions, conducted on March 31, 2025, involved the purchase of a substantial number of shares at various prices, indicating strategic positioning by key stakeholders. The transactions highlight Cadeler’s ongoing activities in the financial markets, which may influence its market perception and stakeholder confidence.

More about Cadeler A/S Sponsored ADR

Cadeler A/S is a global leader in offshore wind installation, operations, and maintenance services, focusing exclusively on the offshore wind industry. The company operates the largest fleet of jack-up offshore wind installation vessels and has been a key supplier in the development of offshore wind energy for over a decade. Cadeler is committed to sustainable wind farm installation and supports the global transition towards renewable energy. The company is listed on the New York Stock Exchange and the Oslo Stock Exchange.

data.title: Yida China Holdings Reports Increased Losses and Revenue Decline in 2023
data.description:
Yida China Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:3639) ) just unveiled an update.

Yida China Holdings Limited reported a significant decline in its financial performance for the year ended December 31, 2023. The company’s revenue decreased by 14% to RMB3,897.15 million, and its gross profit fell by 49.6% to RMB534.44 million. The net loss for the year increased to RMB1,713.82 million from RMB736.49 million in 2022. The board has decided not to declare any final dividend payment for the year.

More about Yida China Holdings Ltd.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: €29.5M

data.title: Westaim and CC Capital Finalize Transformative Insurance and Asset Management Deal
data.description:
An update from Westaim ( (TSE:WED) ) is now available.

Westaim Corporation, in partnership with CC Capital, has completed a significant transaction that transforms it into an integrated insurance and asset management platform. This strategic move, supported by a $250 million investment from CC Capital, brings together Westaim, Arena Investors, and Ceres Life Insurance Company to create a unified platform expected to drive growth and stability. The transaction is anticipated to generate significant value for shareholders and redefine the annuities industry by providing scalable, cloud-native solutions. The new structure includes key leadership appointments and board expansions, positioning Westaim for long-term growth and enhanced service delivery to retirees and investors.

More about Westaim

Westaim Corporation operates in the insurance and asset management industry, focusing on creating integrated platforms that combine technology-enabled insurance solutions with proven asset management capabilities. The company is involved in annuities through its subsidiary Ceres Life Insurance Company and collaborates with Arena Investors, a global institutional asset manager.

data.title: FIL Limited Increases Stake in ConvaTec Group PLC
data.description:
The latest update is out from ConvaTec ( (GB:CTEC) ).

ConvaTec Group PLC, a UK-based company, has announced a change in its major holdings. FIL Limited, registered in Bermuda, has increased its voting rights in ConvaTec to 6.2098% from a previous 5.1%, crossing the 5% threshold. This acquisition of voting rights by FIL Limited, through its controlled undertaking FIL Investments International, indicates a significant stake in ConvaTec, potentially impacting the company’s governance and strategic decisions.
